role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns consistent with the landscape expert role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified temperate deciduous trees and fruit orchards, staying within botanical scope.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (utility poles, fencing) and road types.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole design, image quality) to distinguish between similar candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (Romania). The agents adhered to their roles, providing concrete evidence (fencing, poles, vegetation) that the tournament successfully used to eliminate distractors and select the winner.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of dirt roads, fences, and trees match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of temperate deciduous trees and fruit orchards match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of concrete poles and metal fencing match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of pole geometry and image quality are consistent with the visual input.
